Plugin.Name: Vulkan Support
Plugin.Description:
Provides Vulkan loader, tools, and ICD configuration for NVIDIA GPUs on Unraid. Essential for running GPU-accelerated applications like RealityScan, Blender, and other Vulkan-dependent software in Docker containers.
Features: - Vulkan Loader (libvulkan) - Vulkan Tools (vulkaninfo) - Docker-ready ICD configuration - Web UI status page
Requirements: - Unraid 6.10+ - NVIDIA GPU - NVIDIA Driver plugin installed
Plugin.Changes: ### 2026.03.02 - Initial release - Vulkan loader and tools for NVIDIA GPUs - ICD configuration for Docker containers
